metadata.name: Replace a Vehicle on an Auto Policy

description: A customer sold their old car and bought a new one, and needs to update their auto policy.

nodes.task_description: Identify the policyholder and the vehicle to be removed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the customer and the old vehicle.

nodes.task_description: Collect the new vehicle's information (make, model, year, VIN).

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately captures the new vehicle's details.

nodes.task_description: Update the policy by removing the old vehicle and adding the new one, then recalculate the premium.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the policy and informs the customer of the new premium.
